description: Lifecycle hooks for the AI Analytics Skills workshop. These enforce the safe-write and evidence rules from AGENTS.md. Commands are illustrative; wire them to your own scripts.

preToolUse.name: block-secrets-in-prompt
preToolUse.description: Scan prompt/args for credentials, tokens, PII, or production extracts before any tool runs.

preToolUse.name: require-evidence-for-catalog-write
preToolUse.description: Stop catalog writes unless a reviewed local diff (outputs/catalog-remediation.md) with cited evidence exists.

postToolUse.name: validate-generated-docs
postToolUse.description: Validate generated Markdown/Mermaid against the templates and the data-flow standard.

postToolUse.name: link-checker
postToolUse.description: Run a link checker over generated docs; flag broken references.
